description_long: This is a cubic wooden storage box with a simple, utilitarian design, featuring a frame structure and a single diagonal plank reinforcing each visible face. The box is constructed from medium-brown wood, with visible paneling and a slightly recessed central area on each side. The top appears to be open or partially covered, lacking any visible hinges or locking mechanisms. The surface is matte and slightly rough, suggesting unfinished or lightly sanded wood. There are no visible handles, labels, or decorative elements, emphasizing its functional purpose. This type of box is commonly found in urban environments such as garages, storage rooms, or outdoor utility areas, where it may be used for storing tools, supplies, or miscellaneous items.
description: A cubic, medium-brown wooden storage box with diagonal plank reinforcement and a matte, slightly rough finish. The design is simple and utilitarian, with no visible handles or labels.
description_view_0: Front view shows a square wooden panel with a single diagonal plank running from the bottom left to the top right.
description_view_1: This side view is nearly identical to the front, with the diagonal plank running from the bottom left to the top right, but the lighting and shadowing may differ slightly.
description_view_2: Another side view, visually indistinguishable from view 1, showing the same diagonal plank orientation and panel structure.
description_view_3: Back view mirrors the front, with the same diagonal plank and panel design, maintaining the box's symmetrical appearance.
